subject: fix(security,perf): XSS protection, race conditions, memory leaks, and performance
body:
Security: Sanitize marked HTML output with DOMPurify to prevent XSS via
user-supplied text in both structured and freeform text modes.

Race conditions: Use ref for selectedCell in sample image loading so async
callbacks read current value instead of stale closure capture. Add unmount
guards to prevent state updates on unmounted components.

Performance: Replace JSON.stringify comparison in useHistory with recursive
deepEqual that exits at first mismatch. Replace JSON.parse/JSON.stringify
deep clones with structuredClone. Memoize layout preset comparison in
TemplatesTab. Wrap AdCanvas with React.memo.

Memory leaks: Track setTimeout IDs in ContentTab focus handlers and clear
on unmount. Remove orphaned inline SVG filter with random ID generation.

Input validation: Add 10 MB file size limit on image uploads with toast
feedback to prevent memory issues from large base64 strings in undo history.

Tags: security, performance, race-condition, memory-leak, xss, state
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: hardening
Semver: patch
